session.assistant: All code changes are complete. Now let me verify the changes look correct and run the tests. Let me first quickly verify the modified files look right:

tool_use.name: Task
tool_use.param:
Run the following test suites and report all results. Run each one and report pass/fail co...[truncated 313 chars]...k impl_folder -x -q

tool_use.name: Task
tool_use.param: Run `ty check` on the repository and report the results. Do NOT try to fix anything. Just report what it says.

**ty passed:** All checks passed!

All test suites executed successfully with no failures. agentId: a1fe0c8 (for resuming to continue this agent's work if needed)
